name: Tofu Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the firm tofu.
2. Add the tahini, mustard, tamari, eggless mayo, finely chopped onion, minced garlic, shredded carrots, and chopped parsley to the mashed tofu.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Serve on toast, pita, crackers, or roll up in lettuce leaves.
